name: pm-tactical
description: Five tested skills that make a PM's daily Claude workflow cheaper, faster, and self-checking — now proactive by default: model-complexity-router (silently scores every task handoff, not just direct questions), builder-validator (frozen-spec self-QA, checklist frozen silently, never invents gate-critical facts), prompt-optimizer-loop (one-mutation-per-round prompt tuning), cli-over-mcp-auditor (silent first-prompt relevance check plus full deep-audit flow), pm-context-system (observes the session and proposes one-line log entries instead of interviewing up front).
